title: Vilfa sciurea
taxonomy: Vilfa sciurea is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Poeae and is a part of the genus Vilfa. The tribe Poeae is a large and diverse group of grasses, including many species of grasses and sedges. The genus Vilfa is a group of grasses that are native to the Mediterranean region and are often found in dry, rocky areas. The classification of Vilfa sciurea reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other grasses.
